scripts.deploy: tsc && node view/build.js && mkdir -p $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-social/view && cp dist/*.js manifest.json $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-social/ && cp view/index.js $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-social/view/ && if [ -d $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/.next/standalone/plugins/plugin-social ]; then cp dist/*.js manifest.json $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/.next/standalone/plugins/plugin-social/ && mkdir -p $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/.next/standalone/plugins/plugin-social/view && cp view/index.js $HOME/Dev/TheArchiver/.next/standalone/plugins/plugin-social/view/; fi
scripts.package: tsc && node view/build.js && mkdir -p dist/package/view && cp dist/*.js manifest.json dist/package/ && cp view/index.js dist/package/view/ && cd dist/package && zip -r ../plugin-social.zip .
